briefdescription.para: Bit mask for resetting all IPs in the pipeline.
Number of scene change detection streams to enable (max 8)
Maximum number of test patterns supported by the Test Pattern Generator.
Framebuffer color format (refer to PG278 for format codes)
Number of bytes per color component in framebuffer format.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the terminal screen and resets the cursor to the home position (0,0) using ANSI escape sequences.

simplesect.para: Uses ANSI escape sequences which may not work on all terminals.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for scene change detection.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when a scene change is detected by the IP. It prints the layer ID and SAD (Sum of Absolute Differences) value, and sets the detection flag.

simplesect.para: This callback is registered with XV_scenechange_SetCallback().

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the SceneChange IP for stream mode operation, configures the enabled stream with its parameters (height, width, stride, color format, histogram bits, threshold), sets up interrupts, registers the callback, and starts the IP in auto-restart mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_FAILURE if any initialization step fails
This function expects stream-based mode. It will fail for memory mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function performs a hardware reset of the video processing pipeline by writing to the appropriate registers. The reset sequence ensures proper initialization of all IPs in the pipeline.

simplesect.para: The reset sequence includes setting reset, clearing it, and setting it again to ensure proper IP initialization.

briefdescription.para: Configure the Test Pattern Generator (TPG) IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the TPG IP with the specified parameters including height, width, color format, background pattern, and enables auto-restart mode.

simplesect.para: The TPG is configured for Y-only (grayscale) color format.

briefdescription.para: Configure the Frame Buffer Write IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the Frame Buffer Write IP with the appropriate width, height, stride, video format, and memory buffer address. It enables auto-restart mode and starts the IP.

simplesect.para: The frame buffer is configured to write frames to the memory address specified in the global memaddr variable.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the video pipeline for stream mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes and configures the Test Pattern Generator (TPG) and Frame Buffer Write IPs. It looks up configurations, initializes each IP, sets up interrupts for the Frame Buffer Write IP, and configures the frame buffer.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if pipeline initialization succeeds XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device configuration lookup fails XST_FAILURE if initialization or interrupt setup fails
This function must be called after XV_SceneChange_init().

briefdescription.para: Main function for SceneChange stream mode test application.

detaileddescription.para: This application configures the SceneChange IP in stream mode to calculate SAD values between consecutive frames. It initializes the platform, configures the SceneChange IP, sets up a video pipeline with TPG and Frame Buffer Write, and cycles through different test patterns to trigger scene changes.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if scene change is detected and test passes XST_FAILURE if initialization fails or no scene change detected
The test expects at least one scene change detection within MAX_PATTERNS iterations.
